# MuleSoft OAuth2 Provider Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of OAuth2 Provider Module documentation.
> See [OAuth2 Provider Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/oauth2-provider-module/llms-full.txt) for all the OAuth2 Provider Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [OAuth2 Provider Module 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/oauth2-provider-module/latest/index.md)
- [OAuth2 Provider Module Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/oauth2-provider-module/latest/oauth2-provider-module-example.md)
- [OAuth2 Provider Module 1.2 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/oauth2-provider-module/latest/oauth2-provider-module-reference.md)
- [Troubleshooting OAuth2 Provider Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/oauth2-provider-module/latest/oauth2-provider-module-troubleshooting.md)
- [OAuth2 Provider Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/oauth2-provider-module/latest/oauth2-provider-xml-maven.md)
